description: CEIEF Cultural Knowledge Graph Relation Schema

relation_types.label: embodies
relation_types.description: The subject event/practice embodies or expresses the object cultural concept or value

relation_types.label: commemorates
relation_types.description: The subject event commemorates or honors the object historical actor or event

relation_types.label: belongs_to
relation_types.description: The subject entity belongs to or is a member of the object category or group

relation_types.label: contrasts_with
relation_types.description: The subject stands in contrast or tension with the object, highlighting cultural differences
relation_types.example: (传统仪式, contrasts_with, 现代庆典形式)

relation_types.label: transfers_to
relation_types.description: The subject concept or practice transfers its meaning or function to the object in a different context
relation_types.example: (集体记忆, transfers_to, 社区认同)

relation_types.label: interprets
relation_types.description: The subject concept or practice provides an interpretive lens for understanding the object
relation_types.example: (礼仪, interprets, 社会等级秩序)

relation_types.label: originated_in
relation_types.description: The subject practice or concept originated in the object spatiotemporal context

relation_types.label: practiced_by
relation_types.description: The subject event/practice is carried out by the object historical actor or group

relation_types.label: associated_with
relation_types.description: General association between two entities sharing cultural significance

relation_types.label: reinforces
relation_types.description: The subject practice or concept reinforces or strengthens the object value or concept

relation_types.label: challenges
relation_types.description: The subject practice, concept, or actor challenges or critiques the object value or norm

relation_types.label: occurs_in
relation_types.description: The subject event/practice occurs within the object spatiotemporal context
